retrievals.title: What Is the Difference between Myopia and Hyperopia?
retrievals.combined_text: What Is the Difference between Myopia and Hyperopia? A person with myopia can see things that are near but cannot clearly see things that are far, while a person with hyperopia can see things that are far but cannot clearly see things that are near. Myopia and hyperopia are also known as nearsightedness and farsightedness, respectively. The range of t
